dose_response.reason: causal chain from overfitting to unsafe plans in novel states is captured
dose_response.reference: Overfitting to simulation feedback enables code world models that perform well in simulation but fail in new states, which when used by robotics researchers exposes physical robots to brittle planning, causing unsafe actions and property damage.
dose_response.generated: RL-based code synthesis overfitting to finite test cases, through robotics researchers using code world models, triggers dependency on overfitted models lacking distribution shift safeguards, leading to agents executing erroneous unsafe plans in novel states.
